description: ab-dotfiles hooks：格式化、檔案保護、危險攔截、Slack 通知、context 壓縮、任務確認

hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo '.'); if [ -f "$ROOT/.prettierrc" ] || [ -f "$ROOT/.prettierrc.json" ] || [ -f "$ROOT/prettier.config.js" ] || [ -f "$ROOT/prettier.config.mjs" ] || grep -q prettier "$ROOT/package.json" 2>/dev/null; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; DISPATCH="$(dirname "$0")/../../claude/hooks/slack-dispatch.sh"; [ -x "$DISPATCH" ] && "$DISPATCH" file-edited --file "$FILE"; exit 0

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; DISPATCH="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/../.." 2>/dev/null && pwd)/claude/hooks/slack-dispatch.sh"; for p in '.env' '.env.local' '.env.production' 'package-lock.json' 'pnpm-lock.yaml' 'yarn.lock' 'composer.lock' 'Podfile.lock'; do [[ "$FILE" == *"$p"* ]] && { [ -x "$DISPATCH" ] && "$DISPATCH" protected-file --file "$FILE"; echo "Blocked: $FILE is protected" >&2; exit 2; }; done; exit 0

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; DISPATCH="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/../.." 2>/dev/null && pwd)/claude/hooks/slack-dispatch.sh"; for p in 'rm -rf /' 'git push --force main' 'git push --force master' 'git reset --hard' 'DROP TABLE' 'DROP DATABASE'; do echo "$CMD" | grep -qi "$p" && { [ -x "$DISPATCH" ] && "$DISPATCH" dangerous-command --cmd "$p"; echo "Blocked: dangerous command detected: $p" >&2; exit 2; }; done; exit 0

BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); TICKET=$(echo "$BRANCH" | grep -oE '[A-Z]+-[0-9]+' | head -1); DISPATCH="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/../.." 2>/dev/null && pwd)/claude/hooks/slack-dispatch.sh"; [ -x "$DISPATCH" ] && "$DISPATCH" session-compact; echo "⚠️ Context 已壓縮。保留：當前任務目標、已修改檔案、驗證狀態、未完成 TODO。${TICKET:+Ticket: $TICKET}"

MSG=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo ''); DISPATCH="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/../.." 2>/dev/null && pwd)/claude/hooks/slack-dispatch.sh"; [ -x "$DISPATCH" ] && "$DISPATCH" agent-blocked --msg "$MSG"; osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code 需要注意" with title "ab-dotfiles"' 2>/dev/null; exit 0
INPUT=$(cat); LEN=$(echo "$INPUT" | wc -c | tr -d ' '); [ "$LEN" -lt 3 ] && echo '提示太短，請描述你的需求' >&2 && exit 2; exit 0

hooks.prompt: 上下文已壓縮。確認以下重要資訊仍在記憶中：1) 當前任務目標 2) 已修改的檔案 3) 未完成的步驟。如有遺失，從記憶中恢復。
檢查是否所有要求的任務都已完成。如果有遺漏，回傳 {"ok": false, "reason": "尚未完成：<具體項目>"}。如果都完成了，回傳 {"ok": true}。注意：如果 stop_hook_active 為 true，直接回傳 {"ok": true}。
